title: Make, find and union

publication.changeSummary: Language-neutral DSA draft with explicit C/C++/Java/Python mapping for Make, find and union; independent algorithm, implementation, pedagogy, and accessibility review required. Beginner-quality contract 1.0.0 applied deterministically from existing source-linked draft facts; publication stage and reviewer state are unchanged.

sources.locator: CS2023 Algorithmic Foundations; August 2023; material applicable to Make, find and union
sources.claim: Disjoint-set union maintains a partition through make-set, find representative, and union operations.

canonicalExplanation.summary: Disjoint-set union maintains a partition through make-set, find representative, and union operations.

sections.heading: Start here
sections.body: Start with this case: Two vertices are connected exactly when find returns the same representative after processed unions. Your goal is to implement and test a basic parent-array disjoint-set structure. Work through the example one step at a time, then use the boundary to check your answer.

sections.heading: Before you begin
sections.body: Review these declared prerequisites first: Tree terminology and representation; Array representation and operations. If one is unfamiliar, revisit it before continuing.

sections.heading: Shared concept and invariant
sections.body: Disjoint-set union maintains a partition through make-set, find representative, and union operations. This claim is assessed independently from syntax so conceptual evidence can transfer.

sections.heading: C, C++, Java, and Python implementation map
sections.body: In C, represent adjacency and disjoint sets with explicit buffers and ownership; C++ uses vector-based lists and standard priority structures; Java uses typed collections and careful object equality; Python uses list/dict/set and heapq, with the same graph or partition invariant and complexity target.

sections.heading: Boundary and common failure
sections.body: It tracks connectivity, not paths or deletion, and representative identity is an implementation detail. The draft therefore rejects: The representative returned by find must be the smallest value in the set.

includes: Represent disjoint components and query or combine their representatives.
Implement and test a basic parent-array disjoint-set structure.

In C, represent adjacency and disjoint sets with explicit buffers and ownership; C++ uses vector-based lists and standard priority structures; Java uses typed collections and careful object equality; Python uses list/dict/set and heapq, with the same graph or partition invariant and complexity target.
excludes: It tracks connectivity, not paths or deletion, and representative identity is an implementation detail.

outcomes: Implement and test a basic parent-array disjoint-set structure.

limitations: A physical arrangement does not reproduce asymptotic cost, aliasing, numeric limits, recursion depth, or the four languages' implementation rules.
